content.query:
USE gold_db
GO

CREATE OR ALTER PROC CreateSQLServerlessView_gold @ViewName NVARCHAR(100)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @statement NVARCHAR(MAX) -- Changed to NVARCHAR for better compatibility
    
    -- Clean the variable to prevent path errors
    DECLARE @CleanPath NVARCHAR(200) = LTRIM(RTRIM(@ViewName))

    SET @statement = N'CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [' + @CleanPath + '] AS
        SELECT
            *
        FROM
            OPENROWSET(
                BULK ''https://intechsacc.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/SaleLT/' + @CleanPath + ''',
                FORMAT = ''DELTA''
            ) AS [result]'
    
    -- This executes the string we just built
    EXEC sp_executesql @statement
END
GO
